description.en: A highly social predator of the African savanna, easily recognized by its uniquely painted coat and large, rounded ears.
description.zh: 非洲稀树草原上高度社会化的捕食者，以其独特的彩色斑纹皮毛和巨大的圆耳朵而容易被认出。

anatomy.en: African wild dogs are lean, long-legged hunters. Their scientific name means 'painted wolf' because their fur is covered in beautiful, messy patches of brown, black, yellow, and white. They have huge, Mickey Mouse-like round ears that keep them cool and help them hear friends from far away.
anatomy.zh: 非洲野犬是瘦长、长腿的猎手。它们的学名意思是「彩绘狼」，因为它们的皮毛上布满了美丽而凌乱的棕色、黑色、黄色和白色斑块。它们长着像米老鼠一样的巨大圆耳朵，这能让它们保持凉爽，并听到远方朋友的声音。

ecology_and_behavior.en: These dogs are the best team players in the world! They live in large packs and care deeply for each other, always feeding the puppies and the sick first. Before a hunt, the whole pack gets excited, jumping around and making funny sneezing sounds to 'vote' on whether they are ready to go.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 这些狗是世界上最棒的团队合作者！它们成群生活，彼此深切关怀，总是让幼犬和生病的同伴先吃东西。在狩猎前，整个狗群会兴奋地跳来跳去，并发出有趣的打喷嚏声来「投票」决定是否准备好出发。

habitat_and_distribution.en: They roam the vast, open savannas and dry woodlands of Sub-Saharan Africa. Sadly, because they need huge amounts of space to run and hunt safely, they are very endangered as human farms take over their homes.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 它们漫游在撒哈拉以南非洲广阔的稀树草原和干燥的林地中。令人难过的是，因为它们需要巨大的空间来安全地奔跑和狩猎，随着人类农场占领它们的家园，它们变得非常濒危。

habitat.text_en: Open plains and savannas of Sub-Saharan Africa
habitat.text_zh: 撒哈拉以南非洲的开阔平原和稀树草原
